imageUrl.title: Image URL
imageUrl.description: Publicly fetchable URL of the customer's product photo to reverse-search.

serpApiKey.title: SerpApi key
serpApiKey.description: SerpApi API key (serpapi.com). Used for the Google Lens engine.

resaleDomains.title: Resale domains to flag
resaleDomains.description: If a match's domain is in this list, it counts as a resale-fraud signal.

maxResults.title: Max matches
maxResults.description: Maximum number of visual matches to return.
